blended.narrative: Aspen Highlands is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 7,052 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 33".
